# technitium_dns_zones (Data Source)

Lists all authoritative DNS zones on a Technitium DNS Server.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "technitium_dns_zones" "all" {}

output "zone_names" {
  value = data.technitium_dns_zones.all.zones[*].name
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `zones` (Attributes List) List of DNS zones. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--zones))

<a id="nestedatt--zones"></a>
### Nested Schema for `zones`

Read-Only:

- `disabled` (Boolean) Whether the zone is disabled.
- `dnssec_status` (String) The DNSSEC status of the zone.
- `name` (String) The domain name of the zone.
- `type` (String) The type of zone.
